title: Review: sieve-form MY-OSS round 3
notes: Bikeshedding: NO. Confidence: 10% missed bug. New P0/P1/P2 found: 3. Summary: No correctness bugs found but three P2 gaps remain: missing doc comments on SieveAction variants (esp Reject), zero test coverage for the not operator, and no integration tests for the envelope test or redirect action (with a stale 'not implemented' comment).
